story:
Choose the correct answer from A or B for the following question:
Question:
Lian found a bag in the hall. The label on the bag says button. Lian couldn’t see what was inside the bag. Lian opened the bag and found a cable. There is no button in the bag. Lian closed the bag and put it back. Norina entered the hall and saw the bag. What was in the bag?
A. cable
B. button
Answer:
system_input:

container. Person A opened the container and found item Y. Later, Person B entered the room and saw the container.

[Candidate Answers]
A. vest
B. plate

[Question]
2+2=?

Finally, answer the question in the story when receiving the specific instruction.

[Instruction]

Where is the origin of chocolate?

��/AFP, publié le dimanche 7 mars 2021 à 1659 GMT

Le géant suisse des produits alimentaires Nestlé a annoncé jeudi la création d'une nouvelle division dédiée aux aliments pour animaux de compagnie, baptisée Purina PetCare.

Cette nouvelle entité regroupera les marques existantes de Purina et lancera de nouveaux produits sous ces marques. Elle sera dirigée par David Crosson, actuel directeur général de Purina North America.

Nestlé est déjà un leader mondial dans l'industrie des aliments pour animaux de compagnie avec ses marques comme Pedigree, Whiskas et Purina. La création de cette nouvelle division vise à renforcer sa position sur ce marché en constante croissance.

David Crosson a déclaré : "Nous sommes ravis de créer cette nouvelle entité qui va permettre de mieux servir nos clients et nos consommateurs. Nous avons une excellente équipe chez Purina et nous sommes impatients de continuer à innover et à développer de nouveaux produits."

La division Purina PetCare sera basée au Royaume-Uni et aura son siège social à Waltham, dans le Suffolk.

Nestlé prévoit que cette nouvelle division contribuera significativement à sa stratégie globale et à son objectif de croissance durable.

[Story]
Nestlé announced the creation of a new division dedicated to pet food called Purina PetCare. This new entity will include existing Purina brands and launch new products under these brands. It will be led by David Crosson, current general director of Purina North America. Nestlé is already a global leader in the pet food industry with its brands like Pedigree, Whiskas, and Purina. The creation of this new division aims to strengthen its position in this constantly growing market. David Crosson said they were excited to create this new entity that would better serve their customers and consumers. They have an excellent team at Purina and are eager to continue innovating and developing new products. The division Purina PetCare will be based in the UK and will have its headquarters in Waltham, Suffolk. Nestlé expects this new division to significantly contribute to its overall strategy and sustainable growth goals.

[Question]
What is the name of the new division created by Nestlé?

ser
No, 2111159 is not a prime number. It is divisible by 3 among other numbers.
